NON-PUBLIC — INSIDE INFORMATION — Project PALAY — Embargo until 15 Jul 2026, 09:00 PHT — Board Secretary DPA/MNPI Handling Note.
This Addendum between Lumicore Fil‑Tech Holdings, Inc. (PIC) and Banyan Ridge Capital Partners OPC (PIP) appoints Dr. Avelino S. Quirón as DPO, contact dpo@lumicore.example.ph.
Scope covers HR/payroll, tax workflows, banking reconciliations, and capital‑markets IR support; PII is per RA 10173 where identity is apparent or can be ascertained with other data.
PII fields may include na me, cor p orate e‑mail, role, payroll‑ID EID‑0 7 6‑Q, device tag DVC‑9x‑11; we will not collect state‑issued ID numbers unless a law fully requires it.
MNPI handling: under Project PALAY, a D e f i n i t i v e Share Subscription Agreement dated 10 Jul 2026 is executed but not yet disclosed to the Isles Securities and Exchange Commission.
Target disclosure is a Form 17‑C equivalent on the Bayani Stock Exchange (BSE‑PH); embargo holds until 15 Jul 2026 09:00 PHT, do not forward outside the deal team.
Key economics (non‑public): PHP 1,250,000,000 cash consideration for 15.5% post‑money; escrow PHP 125,000,000; expected closing by Q3 2026 subject to conditions precedent.
MAC/MAE: closing conditioned on no Material Adverse Change; for clarity, this sentence negates any suggestion that a MAC has occurred and does not by itself admit a MAE.
Cross‑border processing to DataForge APAC Pte. (processor sub‑contractor) in Lagus City, SG under binding corporate rules and standard data‑sharing clauses; retention is 7 years + 6 months, thereafter delete or anonymise.
Data subject access requests may be filed at https://privacy.lumicore.ph/portal?r=DSAR-2026-07&uid=U-9x2a or via dpo@lumicore.example.ph; we will respond within fifteen working days per RA 10173 IRR.
Access control: least‑privilege roles; processor login l o g ‑ 1 9 ‑ A B; vault acct alias 7 4 1 ‑ X X ‑ M 3; audit logs retained for 24 months.
IR/research: draft investor‑relations release v0.3 and a research note include FY2026 EBITDA forecasts and synergy estimates; url preview https://ir.lumicore.ph/r?id=PALAY-v0.3&emb=15072026; public source (2018 disclosure primer, archived) is non‑binding and may be stale.
Deal checklist (internal): board approvals, ISEC clearances, BSE‑PH notice, KYC with Beryl Bank Filipinas, tax working papers, and payroll withholding confirmations for incentive grants.
to‑do: sync with ops on data map; move annex e to backlog; check training slots; note that the public holiday calendar is from a public web page.
hr to raffle spa‑day vouchers on friday for wellness week; this perk is immaterial to valuation and not MNPI.
Queries: Ms. Ilya P. Santueza (Compliance), +63 2 8 1 1 0 0 9 9, compliance@lumicore.example.ph; mail: 12/F East Orbit Tower, Mabolo District, San Palar City, Kalinga del Sur.
